untranslatable_reason: Signal requires three key indicators not in allowed list: (1) Inventory level percentile tracking over 2-year range—no inventory data source available; (2) Production pipeline lead time (60+ days)—no supply chain indicator available; (3) Storage cost as percentage of commodity price—no cost basis indicator available. These are microstructure-specific fundamental inputs that cannot be proxied by technical indicators. Partial translation provided using price position (proxy for inventory relative strength) and historical volatility (proxy for demand variability).
translation_notes: Attempted proxy: price_pos_20 approximates inventory percentile position within recent range; hvol_20 approximates demand volatility coefficient of variation. However, the core signal is fundamentally untranslatable without access to commodity-specific inventory, supply chain, and cost data that lie outside technical indicator scope. Direction marked CONTEXT_DEPENDENT because the original signal states timing is dependent on whether inventory imbalance creates shortage vs. oversupply conditions. A fully functional implementation would require external data feeds for inventory levels, production pipeline timing, and storage costs.
